section.heading: Authorization of appropriations; use of funds

subsection.heading: Authorization of Appropriations.—
subsection.content: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2030.

paragraph.content: may be advanced each fiscal year to the National Park Foundation in a lump sum without regard to when expenses are incurred;
shall be provided to the National Park Foundation for use to match contributions (whether in currency, services, or property) made to the Foundation;
may not be used by the National Park Foundation for administrative expenses of the Foundation, including for salaries, travel and transportation expenses, and other overhead expenses; and
may not be deposited by the National Park Foundation into any fund that will be invested or earn interest in any way.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–289, title IV, § 402(a), Dec. 16, 2016, 130 Stat. 1488; amended Pub. L. 117–328, div. DD, title VI, § 646, Dec. 29, 2022, 136 Stat. 5616.)
